results.label: Base utilization screen
results.valueExpression: passes pre-gate only if throughput utilization remains above 68%
results.uncertaintyExpression: sensitive to utilization and quality mix

results.label: Downside screen
results.valueExpression: fails pre-gate under harvest volume downside and low utilization

notes: Screening only. Not financing truth. Full external appraisal required before any final investment decision.
